SEARCH
Package com.orasaka.core.engine

Record Class CoreProperties

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
com.orasaka.core.engine.CoreProperties
Record Components:
defaultProvider - The global AI provider to use (e.g., "ollama", "openai"). Required.
overrides - A map of CoreProperties.ProviderConfig for specific provider settings.
rag - Configuration for Retrieval-Augmented Generation context injection.
mcp - Configuration for Model Context Protocol (MCP) server endpoints.
public record CoreProperties(String defaultProvider, Map<String,CoreProperties.ProviderConfig> overrides, CoreProperties.RagConfig rag, CoreProperties.McpConfig mcp, CoreProperties.OrchestrationConfig orchestration) extends Record
Configuration properties for Orasaka CORS (Cognitive Orchestration and Retrieval System). Maps to orasaka.core in application.yml.

This record defines the structural schema for AI provider orchestration, RAG, and MCP. It utilizes Java 21 Records for immutable, type-safe configuration.

See Also:
  • Spring AI ChatModel

  • Constructor Details

    • CoreProperties

      public CoreProperties(String defaultProvider, Map<String,CoreProperties.ProviderConfig> overrides, CoreProperties.RagConfig rag, CoreProperties.McpConfig mcp, CoreProperties.OrchestrationConfig orchestration)
      Creates an instance of a CoreProperties record class.
      Parameters:
      defaultProvider - the value for the defaultProvider record component
      overrides - the value for the overrides record component
      rag - the value for the rag record component
      mcp - the value for the mcp record component
      orchestration - the value for the orchestration record component

  • Method Details

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. All components in this record class are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object).
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
